data.title: 国际服4周年礼物
data.summary: Today’s the day! Blue Archive’s 4th Anniversary D-day is here! 🎉 If you log in between 7:00 PM today
data.body:
Today’s the day! Blue Archive’s 4th Anniversary D-day is here! 🎉

If you log in between 7:00 PM today and 6:59 PM (UTC) tomorrow, you’ll see a popup banner in-game where you can view the official celebration artwork and receive a Pyroxene gift!

Sensei, thank you so much for being with us on this special 4th Anniversary.
Let’s stay together for many more to come~ 💙

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3211955

#BlueArchive
![20251110_023446.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/17010/rd7jbQ2IJOokCGTqyG86u6d3RUzInGjp.jpg)
